constraints.label: All Edges Must Have Predicate
constraints.label_zh: 所有边必须有谓词
constraints.rule: Every EdgeClass definition MUST declare a non-empty predicate in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE matching ^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$.
constraints.description: Predicates are the canonical relationship names used in cross-subgraph queries and visualization. Missing predicates break graph traversal.

constraints.label: All Nodes Must Have ID
constraints.label_zh: 所有节点必须有 ID
constraints.rule: Every NodeClass definition and every runtime node instance MUST have a non-empty id attribute matching the pattern ^node\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$.
constraints.description: Ensures global identifiability and referential integrity across subgraphs. Validators reject node artifacts missing or malformed ids.

constraints.label: Core Nodes Must Have Evidence
constraints.label_zh: 核心节点必须有证据
constraints.rule: NodeClass definitions in normative subgraphs (agent-core, context-info, memory, tool-action, orchestration, safety-policy) MUST have at least one EVIDENCED_BY edge to an EvidenceRef.
constraints.description: Traceability requirement: core ontology concepts must cite diagram, paper, or protocol sources. Warnings emitted when evidence is missing.

constraints.label: Agent Must Have Decision Loop
constraints.label_zh: 智能体必须有决策循环
constraints.rule: Every Agent node instance MUST have exactly one outgoing RUNS_DECISION_LOOP edge to a DecisionLoop node.
constraints.description: Agents without a decision loop cannot execute perceive-reason-act cycles. Validators reject incomplete agent definitions.

constraints.label: Agent Must Have Goal
constraints.label_zh: 智能体必须有目标
constraints.rule: Every Agent node instance MUST have at least one outgoing PURSUES_GOAL edge to a Goal node with non-empty goal_statement.
constraints.description: Goal-directed behavior is foundational. Agents without goals cannot satisfy the goal_driven interface contract.

constraints.label: Context Source Must Have Trust
constraints.label_zh: 上下文源必须有信任标签
constraints.rule: Every context source node (file_system_source, database_source, network_source, graph_source, embedding_source, skill_source, tool_info_source, memory_file_source) MUST declare a trust_label attribute with a non-empty value from the allowed enumeration.
constraints.description: Information flow control requires explicit trust classification on all context sources per FIDES and safety-policy subgraph alignment.

constraints.label: Light Index Must Have Discovery Edge
constraints.label_zh: 轻量索引必须有发现边
constraints.rule: Every LightIndex node instance MUST have at least one incoming SUMMARIZES_TO edge and at least one outgoing or incoming DISCLOSES_ON_DEMAND edge connecting progressive disclosure to loadable sources.
constraints.description: Light indexes exist to enable discovery-driven progressive disclosure. Orphan indexes without summarization or disclosure links indicate incomplete context architecture.

constraints.label: Progressive Disclosure Must Be Node
constraints.label_zh: 渐进式披露必须是节点
constraints.rule: The context-info subgraph MUST define node.progressive_disclosure as an active NodeClass. Implementations referencing progressive disclosure patterns must link via DISCLOSES_ON_DEMAND edges.
constraints.description: Progressive disclosure is a first-class ontology concept from the Agent Structure Graph InfoPlane, not an implicit implementation detail.

constraints.label: Memory Write Must Have Policy
constraints.label_zh: 记忆写入必须关联策略
constraints.rule: Every MemoryWriter instance MUST have at least one outgoing WRITES_TO edge to a MemoryStore that is governed by a MemoryForgettingPolicy via FORGETS_BY_POLICY or an equivalent policy binding.
constraints.description: Ensures all memory persistence operations are subject to retention and forgetting rules.

constraints.label: Retrieval Must Produce Ranked Results
constraints.label_zh: 检索必须产生排序结果
constraints.rule: Every MemoryRetriever query operation MUST produce an ordered list of results with associated relevance scores. Empty results are valid; unordered results are not.
constraints.description: Guarantees downstream consumers receive consistently ranked retrieval output.

constraints.label: Plan Step Must Bind Action
constraints.label_zh: 计划步骤必须绑定动作
constraints.rule: Every PlanStep node MUST have a non-empty action_ref attribute referencing a valid action in the action space. Steps without bound actions are invalid.
constraints.description: Ensures plans are executable rather than abstract intent lists.

constraints.label: Reasoning Trace Must Have Budget
constraints.label_zh: 推理轨迹必须关联预算
constraints.rule: Every ReasoningTrace MUST have at least one incoming CONSUMES_BUDGET edge from a ThinkingBudget, or be directly linked to a ReasoningProcess that consumes a budget.
constraints.description: Prevents unbounded reasoning without resource accountability.

constraints.label: Deferred Tool Must Connect Search
constraints.label_zh: 延迟工具必须连接搜索
constraints.rule: Every DeferredToolDefinition MUST have at least one MATCHED_BY edge from ToolSearch or be reachable via ToolDiscovery, ensuring lazy-loaded tools remain discoverable.
constraints.description: Prevents orphaned deferred tools that cannot be found at selection time.

constraints.label: Programmatic Calling Must Use Sandbox
constraints.label_zh: 程序化调用必须使用沙箱
constraints.rule: Every ProgrammaticToolCalling instance MUST have an outgoing EXECUTES_CODE edge to a CodeExecutionAction with a non-empty sandbox_id, ensuring orchestration code runs isolated.
constraints.description: Prevents unconstrained multi-tool code execution outside sandbox boundaries.

constraints.label: Side Effect Must Have Policy
constraints.label_zh: 副作用必须关联策略
constraints.rule: Every SideEffect node MUST be connected via HAS_SIDE_EFFECT from an ExternalAction that has a policy binding governing authorization, audit, and rollback requirements.
constraints.description: Ensures environment-affecting actions are policy-governed.

constraints.label: Tool Call Must Be Guarded
constraints.label_zh: 工具调用必须受策略保护
constraints.rule: Every ToolCall node MUST have at least one outgoing GUARDED_BY edge to a PolicyContract in the safety-policy-graph before execution may proceed.
constraints.description: Ensures all tool invocations pass through authorization and policy enforcement.

constraints.label: Evaluator Must Be Separable
constraints.label_zh: 评估器必须可分离
constraints.rule:
Every node.evaluator MUST NOT modify the artifact it assesses; it may only emit feedback, scores, or pass/fail signals.
Revision MUST occur only via a distinct node.optimizer or generator node.
constraints.description: Separation of assessment from generation prevents evaluation bias and enables auditable quality loops.

constraints.label: Subagent Must Have Delegation Contract
constraints.label_zh: 子智能体必须有委派契约
constraints.rule:
Every node.subagent instance MUST reference or be connected via DELEGATES_TO to a node.delegation_contract that defines
permitted scope before execution begins.
constraints.description:
Subagents operate with bounded authority; execution without an explicit delegation contract violates least-privilege
orchestration.

constraints.label: Long Running Must Have Checkpoint
constraints.label_zh: 长运行必须有检查点
constraints.rule:
Any node.run expected to exceed configured duration thresholds MUST attach a node.checkpoint strategy via CHECKPOINTS
before entering long-running execution.
constraints.description: Checkpointing enables recovery and prevents total work loss on interruption.

constraints.label: Sandbox Is Execution Boundary
constraints.label_zh: 沙箱是执行边界
constraints.rule:
All side-effecting environment actions MUST execute within node.sandbox via EXECUTES_IN. Direct host execution outside
the sandbox boundary is forbidden for untrusted agent actions.
constraints.description: Sandbox isolation is the primary containment for tool and command execution.

constraints.label: Session Is Not Context Window
constraints.label_zh: 会话不是上下文窗口
constraints.rule:
node.session MUST NOT be conflated with the ephemeral model context window. Session spans multiple runs; context window
is per-turn working memory materialized from transcript, retrieval, and instructions.
constraints.description: Confusing session persistence with context window leads to incorrect compaction and memory architecture.

constraints.label: Transcript Is Not Memory
constraints.label_zh: 转录不是记忆
constraints.rule:
node.transcript records the ordered narrative of messages and events but MUST NOT serve as the sole long-horizon recall
mechanism. Durable recall MUST use memory-graph artifacts.
constraints.description: Transcripts are lossy under compaction; treating them as memory causes recall gaps.

constraints.label: Least Privilege Must Be Monotonic
constraints.label_zh: 最小权限必须单调
constraints.rule:
Permission scope MUST NOT expand automatically during a session without explicit elevation through node.approval_flow
or node.escalation. node.least_privilege.monotonic_reduction MUST be honored.
constraints.description: Automatic permission expansion undermines defense-in-depth and audit boundaries.

constraints.label: Memory Write Must Have Policy
constraints.label_zh: 记忆写入必须有策略
constraints.rule:
Every memory write operation MUST connect to a write policy via GUARDS or LABELS_DATA ensuring data classification
and retention rules are enforced.
constraints.description: Uncontrolled memory writes may persist sensitive or tainted data beyond policy limits.

constraints.label: Protocol Endpoint Must Have Auth
constraints.label_zh: 协议端点必须有认证
constraints.rule:
Every protocol endpoint exposed to external callers MUST have an authorization scheme or explicit public-endpoint policy
attached via GUARDS.
constraints.description: Unauthenticated endpoints expose agent capabilities to unauthorized actors.

constraints.label: Side Effect Must Have Permission Path
constraints.label_zh: 副作用必须有权限路径
constraints.rule:
Every side-effecting environment action MUST trace an AUTHORIZES or explicit allow-list path through node.permission_policy
before execution.
constraints.description: Side effects without permission paths violate least-privilege and auditability requirements.

constraints.label: Tool Call Must Be Guarded
constraints.label_zh: 工具调用必须被防护
constraints.rule:
Every node.tool_call instance MUST have at least one incoming GUARDS edge from a node.policy_contract or equivalent
permission policy before execution proceeds. Cross-reference: ontology/05-tool-action-graph.
constraints.description: Unguarded tool calls enable unrestricted side effects in untrusted agent contexts.

constraints.label: Endpoint Must Have Auth
constraints.label_zh: 端点必须有授权
constraints.rule: Every node.protocol_endpoint instance MUST have at least one outgoing AUTHORIZES_WITH edge to a node.authorization_scheme, unless scheme_type is explicitly none in a documented public endpoint.
constraints.description: Security integrity rule ensuring all protocol endpoints declare their authentication and authorization requirements.

constraints.label: Tool Exposure Must Reference Definition
constraints.label_zh: 工具暴露必须引用定义
constraints.rule: Every node.tool_exposure MUST reference a valid input_schema_ref and SHOULD reference output_schema_ref linking to a tool definition in the tool-action subgraph.
constraints.description: Interoperability constraint ensuring exposed tools are schema-validated and traceable to canonical tool definitions.

constraints.label: Adapter API Must Connect Environment
constraints.label_zh: 适配器 API 必须连接环境
constraints.rule: node.adapter_api MUST provide registration paths for node.sdk_environment_adapter instances connecting to environment-adapter-graph environments.
constraints.description: Integration constraint ensuring SDK can bridge to all environment types via adapters.

constraints.label: Policy API Must Intercept All Actions
constraints.label_zh: 策略 API 必须拦截所有动作
constraints.rule: Every action dispatched through node.tool_api MUST pass through node.policy_api evaluation before execution unless explicitly exempted by documented policy.
constraints.description: Safety constraint ensuring policy enforcement is mandatory on all agent actions.

constraints.label: SDK Must Not Depend On Vendor
constraints.label_zh: SDK 不得依赖厂商
constraints.rule: No node in the universal-sdk-graph subgraph MAY reference vendor-specific identifiers in id fields, attribute values, or required configuration keys.
constraints.description: Vendor neutrality rule ensuring the universal SDK abstraction remains implementation-agnostic.

constraints.label: Tool API Must Support All Action Types
constraints.label_zh: 工具 API 必须支持所有动作类型
constraints.rule: node.tool_api MUST expose operations covering registration, discovery, invocation, and result handling for all action types defined in the tool-action subgraph.
constraints.description: Completeness constraint ensuring the tool API is a full-fidelity gateway to agent actions.

constraints.label: Trace API Must Connect Runtime Events
constraints.label_zh: 追踪 API 必须连接运行时事件
constraints.rule: node.trace_api MUST subscribe to events emitted via edge.SDK_EMITS_EVENT from node.sdk_kernel and produce correlated trace spans.
constraints.description: Observability constraint linking runtime events to trace export for debugging and audit.

constraints.label: Environment Action Must Have Permission
constraints.label_zh: 环境动作必须有权限
constraints.rule: Every node.environment_action instance MUST have at least one REQUIRES_PERMISSION edge to a node.permission_surface granting the action, or explicit policy exemption.
constraints.description: Safety rule ensuring all environment mutations pass permission checks before execution.

constraints.label: Environment Must Define Observation Action State
constraints.label_zh: 环境必须定义观测动作状态
constraints.rule: Every concrete environment node type MUST implement contract.observable and contract.actionable and support READS_STATE and WRITES_STATE via an environment adapter.
constraints.description: Completeness rule ensuring all environments support the full observe-act-state triangle.

constraints.label: Release Gate Must Check All
constraints.label_zh: 发布门禁必须检查全部
constraints.rule: node.release_gate MUST reference all mandatory_checkers and block release when any mandatory checker reports failed status at blocking severity.
constraints.description: Release integrity rule ensuring no mandatory validation is bypassed before ontology release.

constraints.label: Validator Must Connect To Target
constraints.label_zh: 验证器必须连接目标
constraints.rule: Every specialized checker node MUST be reachable from node.graph_validator via edge.VALIDATES, defining explicit validation scope.
constraints.description: Structural rule ensuring all checkers are orchestrated by the top-level graph validator.
